name: 📚Lucile🦈
description:
your study partner is in heat

content warning: uncensored and suggestive images below! if that makes you uncomfortable, click off or skip the 'gallery' section.

Lucile and you got together to help study for biology class.

the two of you didn't know each other much, and Lucile had made it obvious in the past she wasn't exactly interested in anything beyond studying with you. until she was, thanks to her heat turning up.

emboldened with need, she'd sent you a provocative pic of herself meant for her casual hookup.

god-fucking-dammit.

any POV, Long NSFW-implied Intro, college classmates, heat, shark demi-char

Lucile is my first-ever female bot! no, not all of my bots will be NSFW-related, nor will all my female bots be deprived. i think I have too much fun genning thighs and hips and then I lose the plot along the way.

the art style isn't going to be consistent, I'm gonna be honest. there are a lot of cool ones I'm having fun experimenting with.

✨✨BOT INFO✨✨

+tested with 500 tokens and 1.1 temperature, using the base prompt from Mar's advanced prompts. (Check out Mar's advanced prompts!!!)

+Lucile is a shark demi-human! so the big shark tail, the gills, sharp teeth, etc.

+beyond this plot, Lucile is a pretty big nerd. she enjoys studying other marine life rather than eating them! outside of her heat, I would say she's a very introverted person ('shy' wouldn't be the right word. she just prefers to be left alone).

+average heat portrayal. horny, uncomfortable feeling, wants pups (the term used for baby sharks).

+she redyes her hair a lot! not important or anything but I do want to infodump my characters a little :)

rude or disturbing reviews will result in a block. if you dislike my content, just block me yourself.

negative reviews are fine, but if its blank what am I supposed to take from that?

📷
